title: VulkShade
description: This mod brings shaders to Vulkan (fork of vulkanmod). You can now experience better graphics with the same hardware :)
body:
# VulkShade - Shaders on Vulkan
A fork of the popular mod [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) implementing performant shaders and features.

![Preview v1.0.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cI42FcTE/images/e430ec82d6cd7b99c43e103c70fd02d011436150.png)


## Features:
- Shader Support (Only pre-made for now, if mod gains traction, I'll add more)
- FSR
- DLSS (With frame gen in v1.0.3)
- XeSS
- Various Shader Settings

## Coming Soon:
- Built in LoD
- HDR (scRGB or HDR10)
- Auto Exposure
- Custom shaderpacks

## Thanks to:
- The vulkanmod developers
- Gamingabdul for being my lab rat
- The creators of MakeUpUltraFast v9 (default shader is a port of this)
